title: EFL NPC Definition
description: Schema for EFL NPC definitions. 'local' NPCs exist only inside EFL areas; 'world' NPCs have time-of-day schedules and may be present in any area.

id.description: Unique NPC identifier within this pack.

areaId.description: EFL area ID where this NPC always appears.

unlockTrigger.description: EFL trigger ID that must be true for this NPC to appear.

id.description: Unique NPC identifier within this pack.

objectName.description: GML object name to instantiate, e.g. "par_NPC". Required for the NPC to be spawned at runtime.

defaultAreaId.description: Area where this NPC appears when no schedule entry covers the current time.

defaultAnchorId.description: Pixel position as "x,y" used when defaultAreaId applies.

unlockTrigger.description: EFL trigger ID that must be true for this NPC to be spawned.

schedule.description: Time-of-day schedule entries. Evaluated in order; first match wins.

fromSeconds.description: Start of this schedule window, in seconds since midnight (e.g. 21600 = 6AM).

toSeconds.description: End of this schedule window (exclusive), in seconds since midnight.

areaId.description: EFL area ID where this NPC should be during this window.

anchorId.description: Pixel position as "x,y" within the area.

giftableItems.description: Item IDs this NPC accepts as gifts.
